content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses generic therapy/coaching language throughout with no signature AoA questions, no framework invocations, and no AoA-specific distinctions. There is no naming of the fear triangle despite the aggressive-victim-stance being live from turn 1. No 'what are you defending?', no 'what makes you care about the outcome?', no 'what if you acted exactly how you want?'. Instead, the coach deploys the classic CBT/therapy move of 'what would you say to a friend?' (turn 12) — an explicitly non-AoA reframing technique. The coach also uses cognitive reframing language ('that's not a cognitive distortion'), the 'is it the situation or your feeling about it' split (turn 2), and the 'either/or vs both/and' reframe (turn 14) — all CBT-flavored moves. There is no feel-over-figure orientation; the coach stays entirely in cognitive/analytical territory and never invites the client into the body or the feeling underneath the trappedness (helplessness, shame, rage).",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Opens with a CBT-style 'is it real or is it a feeling' split — not an AoA move; no signature question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'That's not a cognitive distortion' — explicit CBT vocabulary, anti-AoA frame."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'Is that the frustration talking?' — generic coaching question; misses the chance to name aggressive-victim-stance or fear triangle."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Strategizing/diagnostic question about the search process — drifts toward strategizing the external situation, which is a flagged trap."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Reassurance/validation move ('it sounds exhausted'); no invitation toward the feeling underneath."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'What would you say to a friend?' — a classic CBT/self-compassion reframe, explicitly non-AoA."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'Both/and' cognitive reframe and abstract 'what would it mean' question — never lands on the feared feeling or names the choice being avoided."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "aggressive-victim-stance", "trappedness-feeling", "fear-triangle", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Coach is warm and articulate but operating from a generic therapeutic/CBT register. No signature AoA questions, frameworks, or distinctions appear anywhere in the conversation."
}
